originalUrl.description: Original team picture url for icon generation

project.description: Contains information about the project with which the board is associated.

originalUrl.description: Original team picture url for icon generation

policy.description: Defines the permissions policies and sharing policies for the board.

permissionsPolicy.description: Defines the permissions policies for the board.

collaborationToolsStartAccess.description: Defines who can start or stop timer, voting, video chat, screen sharing, attention management. Others will only be able to join. To change the value for the `collaborationToolsStartAccess` parameter, contact Miro Customer Support.

copyAccess.description: Defines who can copy the board, copy objects, download images, and save the board as a template or PDF.

sharingAccess.description: Defines who can change access and invite users to this board. To change the value for the `sharingAccess` parameter, contact Miro Customer Support.

sharingPolicy.description: Defines the public-level, organization-level, and team-level access for the board. The access level that a user gets depends on the highest level of access that results from considering the public-level, team-level, organization-level, and direct sharing access.

access.description: Defines the public-level access to the board.

accessPasswordRequired.description: Defines if a password is required to access the board.

inviteToAccountAndBoardLinkAccess.description: Defines the user role when inviting a user via the invite to team and board link. For Enterprise users, the `inviteToAccountAndBoardLinkAccess` parameter is always set to `no_access`.

organizationAccess.description: Defines the organization-level access to the board. If the board is created for a team that does not belong to an organization, the `organizationAccess` parameter is always set to the default value.

teamAccess.description: Defines the team-level access to the board.

owner.description: Contains information about the user who created the board.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

currentUserMembership.description: Contains the current user's board membership details. The current user could be different from the board owner.

type.description: Type of the object that is returned. In this case, `type` returns `board_member`.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the board was created. Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

createdBy.description: Contains information about the user who created the board.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

lastOpenedAt.description: Date and time when the board was last opened by any user. Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

lastOpenedBy.description: Contains information about the user who last opened the board.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

modifiedAt.description: Date and time when the board was last modified. Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

modifiedBy.description: Contains information about the user who created the board.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

links.description: Contains applicable links for the board.

related.description: Link to obtain information about the board members associated with the board.

self.description: Link to obtain information about the current board.

type.description: Type of the object that is returned. In this case, type returns `board`.
